task_completion.description: Log in to the Nx Witness Web Admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness Web Admin dashboard is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Permanently delete the VMS account for 'john.smith'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Users list or settings menu of the Web Admin, the account 'john.smith' is absent or a confirmation message of deletion is visible.

task_completion.description: Permanently delete the VMS account for 'sarah.jones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Users list or settings menu of the Web Admin, the account 'sarah.jones' is absent or a confirmation message of deletion is visible.

task_completion.description: Create a new VMS account for the external auditor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Users list or user details screen shows a new user with the login 'ext.auditor', full name 'External Security Auditor', and email 'auditor@thirdparty-sec.com'.

task_completion.description: Assign the Viewer role to the new external auditor account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The role or permissions setting for the 'ext.auditor' account is explicitly set to 'Viewer'.

task_completion.description: Create a monitoring layout named 'Audit Trail View'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layout tab, title, or list item clearly displays the name 'Audit Trail View'.

task_completion.description: Add the Entrance Camera and Server Room Camera to the new layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Audit Trail View' layout displays video feeds, panels, or placeholders specifically labeled 'Entrance Camera' and 'Server Room Camera'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nx Witness Web Admin via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Nx Witness interface, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Nx Witness application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Nx Witness Web Admin UI, not a mock HTML page or text editor containing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., SQLite or PostgreSQL) being executed to manually insert or delete users and layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Users to delete: 'john.smith' and 'sarah.jones'. New user details: login 'ext.auditor', email 'auditor@thirdparty-sec.com'. CRITICAL NOTE: The verifier expects the new user's full name to be 'External Security Auditor' (not just 'External Auditor'). Target layout name: 'Audit Trail View'. Layout cameras: 'Entrance Camera' and 'Server Room Camera'. Pass threshold is 70 points.
